expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into next feature QA plan
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly concludes the focus is not covered: "Fail (focus not explicitly covered by contract)" and "it does not define any mechanism to: ingest prior defect learnings ... translate them into regression scenarios, or explicitly inject those scenarios into the QA plan".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase8
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md state Phase 8 is not present in the contract: execution_notes.md: "Phase 8 does not exist (phases 0–7 only)"; result.md: "Fail (contract gap): ... defines phases 0–7 only. There is no Phase 8 entrypoint". Therefore the output cannot align with phase8.
